examples: They began to carve separate letters.
Shopkeepers would carve into stone, clay, or wood symbols for the products they had for sale.
Gillian had asked a local worker to carve the bowls from a piece of the trunk of the golden elm.
We paint a number on each stone, then we carve the number on the stone.
It took weeks just to gather the stone tablets on which to carve these new rules.
